---
title: "Governance Status"
---

## Status

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Governance complete | {{< meta governance_complete >}} |
| Last updated | {{< meta last_updated >}} |

## Governance artefacts checklist

- [ ] Dataset Card completed
- [ ] Model Card completed
- [ ] Risk Register filled
- [ ] Decision Log updated
- [ ] Reproducibility Checklist completed
- [ ] AI Disclosure Statement completed (if applicable)

::: {.callout-note}
Tick boxes in the source file and re-render to preserve the record.
:::
